issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive/static effect), not 'OnAttack'. This is a continuous passive ability, not an attack-triggered effect.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (text says '[Opponent's Turn]'), not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a major violation of duration rules.
Target should filter for {Drum Kingdom} type Characters. Current target lacks type filter condition.
